# Hangende Hapjes

> Live catering concept based in Hilversum, the Netherlands. Charlotte and Gijs walk between guests at weddings, receptions, and parties with a tray slung from the neck and prepare each snack live, in front of the guest.

Two complementary concepts, bookable separately or together at the same event:

- **De Toetjes Vrouw** — Charlotte makes fresh tiramisu, individually built per guest. Sweet, classic, made with airy mascarpone cream, mokapot espresso, liqueur, and cocoa.
- **De Borrel Baas** — Gijs makes live burrata bowls. Buffalo stracciatella (the creamy inside of a burrata) with Scrocchi toasts to dip, plus toppings and sauces of the guest's choice. Savory, fresh.

## Booking

- From €425 for 50 portions (De Toetjes Vrouw)
- From €450 for 50 portions (De Borrel Baas)
- Larger quantities (100, 200) available; quoted on request
- First 50 km from Hilversum included; €0,45 per km beyond
- Available throughout the Netherlands and Belgium
- Pace: ~50 portions per hour per server; faster pacing available with extra serving staff at extra cost
- Custom snack ideas welcome — get in touch
- Contact: info@hangendehapjes.nl

## Founders

Charlotte and Gijs are a married couple in Hilversum, ~15 years together, with a long shared history of cooking and hosting at home. Hangende Hapjes is their first catering concept. Charlotte's background is in baking and classic, sweet preparations; Gijs leans savory and experimental. The two concepts reflect those preferences.
